title: Compose Specification, Services, Projects, Dependencies, and Lifecycle · Stakeholder Container Mission
summary: A nonprofit intake operations team. The team needs web, worker, and database services with least-exposure networks, durable volumes, dependency health, a verified backup, and teardown that preserves required data. Planned artifact: Deliver Recoverable Intake Service Stack with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Quiesce or snapshot consistently, create a bounded backup, verify integrity, restore into a fresh volume, and rehearse application recovery.
Segment frontend, backend, data, egress, internal, and attachable networks and verify which paths remain reachable.
Use depends_on conditions, healthchecks, completed jobs, required dependencies, and application retry without confusing order with readiness.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Project Docker Storage Backup Restore Test
steps.instruction:
project case — A project three-service project has hidden interpolation, name collisions, start-order assumptions, a mutable image, and teardown that may delete intake data. Render the model, dry-run lifecycle, and prove preservation.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Project Docker Storage Backup Restore Test.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for quiesce or snapshot consistently, create a bounded backup, verify integrity, restore into a fresh volume, and rehearse application recovery. steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Docker Compose Up Down State
steps.instruction:
Append the Docker evidence item headed "  # Evidence: docker-compose-up-down-state-1cur6k". Tailor its compose.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic review command, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run Docker commands later in an authorized disposable transfer environment.

Evidence target: Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Docker Compose Up Down State.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Docker Compose Up Down State into observable performance evidence. For Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Docker Compose Up Down State, keep Docker Compose Up Down State connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: docker-compose-up-down-state-1cur6k
  - competency: docker-compose-up-down-state
    artifact: compose.yaml
    decision: compose up down state
    scenario-variant: 2
    environment: multi-tenant build farm using an isolated BuildKit driver
    fault-injection: fill the writable layer before graceful termination
    retained-proof: redacted configuration render and secret-rotation confirmation
    case-key: 1cur6k
    change: |
      services:
      api:
      image: registry.example.test/intake@sha256:verified
      depends_on:
      db:
      condition: service_healthy
      volumes:
      intake-data:
    verify: docker compose config --quiet && docker compose --dry-run up --build
    failure: Reject start order as readiness proof, implicit project identity, floating images, or teardown that silently deletes required volumes.
    repair: Render the merged model, pin identities, encode health dependencies, inspect the dry run, and document down versus down --volumes.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.text: The Docker Compose Up Down State structural check is only one gate. validated multi-service Compose application model must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
